'''Rennek''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked as a [[Nerf herder/Legends|nerf herder]] for the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]-based [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Rennek was present in the audience chamber of [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's desert palace]] when the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and later [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] there to free their [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cohort [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from Jabba's clutches.

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] Rennek lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="rotj" /> He found work as a [[Nerf herder/Legends|nerf herder]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]],<ref name="CCG" /> a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|130|Jabba the Hutt (Jabba Desilijic Tiure)}}</ref> Rennek personally oversaw the herding of Jabba's [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]].<ref name="CCG" />

[[File:Rennek.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Rennek worked in Jabba the Hutt's palace as a nerf herder.]]
In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which includes Rennek's [[Time/Legends|time]] at [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Rennek was in the audience chamber of [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's desert palace]], standing right behind the crime lord's [[Throne/Legends|throne]], when the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] on behalf of their master, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to free their captive ally [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who was [[Carbon-freezing/Legends|frozen]] in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and hung on display within the palace. During the incident, Rennek was among those within the courtroom who witnessed the Hutt drop the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] dancer [[Oola/Legends|Oola]] into the pit of his [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|pet rancor]], and rushed forward to witness her [[Death/Legends|demise]].<ref name="rotj" />

Rennek again stood behind Jabba's throne in the audience chamber when Rebel Alliance leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], in the disguise of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]], also arrived with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] as her alleged [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]], ostensibly to bargain for the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on Chewbacca's capture. Organa threatened to destroy the palace with a [[Class-A thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] if the Hutt did not comply with her demands. After winning Jabba's favor, Organa later [[Rescue of Han Solo/Legends|freed]] Solo—the true reason she had arrived at the palace—and attempted to escape with him, but both were caught and subsequently imprisoned.<ref name="rotj" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:Rennek_SWI_60.jpg|250px|thumb|Rennek was an expert in unusual combat techniques.]]
Despite his scruffy appearance,<ref name="CCG" /> Rennek was a lethal combatant<ref name="Who's Who">{{InsiderCite|60|Who's Who in Jabba's Palace}}</ref> with an expertise in unusual combat techniques.<ref name="CCG" /> He could defeat the toughest of Jabba's [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards—attributes not reflected by his trifling assignment as the Hutt's nerf herder.<ref name="Who's Who" /> When Oola was eaten by Jabba's [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]], Rennek joined others in the courtroom in laughing at the dancer's fate. He had dark skin, [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]],<ref name="rotj" /> and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="RES" /> Rennek's name was a common name for male [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]],<ref name="Gamer">{{GamerCite|9|Callsigns: Names of Corellia}}</ref> a human race native to the [[Corellian system/Legends|eponymous star system]].<ref name="CSWE Corellian">{{CSWECite|I|142|Corellian}}</ref>

==Equipment==
As a nerf herder,<ref name="CCG" /> Rennek wore a white fur-trimmed [[Jacket/Legends|coat]] during his [[Time/Legends|time]] at Jabba's Palace. He also wore a white [[shirt]] with interconnected tubing, which ran along the middle of his torso and down between his [[Limb/Legends|legs]].<ref name="rotj" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rennek first appeared as an extra in the Jabba's Palace sequence of the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. The character's first scene, featuring the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band's]] performance of "[[Lapti Nek/Legends|Lapti Nek]]," was cut from the film's [[1997]] [[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition|Special Edition]] release, but Rennek is still visible in new footage of the [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] Band's performance of "[[Jedi Rocks/Legends|Jedi Rocks]]" created for the Special Edition.<ref name="rotj" /> The cut footage for "Lapti Nek" is included in [["Lapti Nek": The Music Video from Jabba's Palace]], which was commercially released for the ''[[Star Wars Trilogy: The Definitive Collection]]'' LaserDisc in [[1993]].<ref name="Lapti Nek">[["Lapti Nek": The Music Video from Jabba's Palace]]—''[[Star Wars Trilogy: The Definitive Collection]]''</ref>

The character was first identified by name on the [http://www.starwarsccg.org/cardlists/images/starwars/JabbasPalace-Light/large/rennek.gif "Rennek" card] as part of the [[May]] [[1998]] ''[[Jabba's Palace Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" /> Spelled backward, Rennek's name is an anagram of toy manufacturer [[Kenner Products|Kenner]].<ref name="Kenner History">{{WebCite|url=http://www.kennertoys.com/history.html|text=The History of Kenner|work=KennerToys.com|archivedate=20060415010921}}</ref>
